login.title: Mailbox Login
login.subtitle: Enter your case number and passphrase to access your secure mailbox.
login.passphrase_hint: The 6-word passphrase or your self-chosen password
login.error: Case number or passphrase is invalid. Please check your input.
login.magic_link_text: Provided an email address with your report?

messages.error: Messages could not be loaded. Your session may have expired.
messages.empty: No messages yet. Send a message or wait for a response.

send.hint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for line break
send.error: Message could not be sent. Please try again.

error.no_session_text: Please log in again to access your mailbox.

magic_link.title: Login via Email Link
magic_link.subtitle: Enter your case number and the email address you provided when submitting your report.
magic_link.email_hint: The email address you provided when submitting your report.
magic_link.success_text: If the provided email address is linked to a report, you will receive a login link shortly. Please also check your spam folder.
magic_link.success_expiry: The link is valid for 15 minutes.

magic_link_verify.no_token_text: Please open the link from your email. This page cannot be accessed directly.
magic_link_verify.verifying_text: Please wait while your login link is being verified...
magic_link_verify.error_text: The link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new link.
magic_link_verify.error_generic: The link is invalid or has expired.
magic_link_verify.success_text: You are being redirected to your mailbox...

validation.case_number_length: The case number must be exactly 16 characters long.
validation.passphrase_required: Please enter your passphrase or password.
validation.message_max: The message must not exceed 50,000 characters.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
